functions_that_reject_invalid_squads: script.js getValidLockedSquadPlayers rejects locked players that exceed position/country limits before seeding the optimizer
script.js optimizerStateIsValidFullSquad rejects incomplete, over-budget, wrong-position, or over-country-limit states after path search
script.js generatedFinalRoundBalancedSquad rejects an artifact-backed squad when selected rows fail to resolve, active eligibility fails, or shape constraints fail
script.js swapStarterWithBench rejects starter/bench swaps that create an unsupported formation
script.js buildRuleValidations marks invalid rendered squads for user-visible rule checks

constraint_blocks.classification: pure constraint check safe to extract now
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderBudgetConstraint and validateTeamBuilderSquadConstraints added; script.js now uses shared helper for full-squad validation and rule-check booleans.

constraint_blocks.classification: pure constraint check safe to extract now
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderPositionConstraints added and used by positionsMatchRequirements.

constraint_blocks.classification: pure constraint check safe to extract now
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderSquadSize added and used through validateTeamBuilderSquadConstraints.
validateTeamBuilderTeamConstraint added; canAddCountry remains in script.js because it affects path expansion and candidate selection.
validateTeamBuilderFixtureConstraint added for report-level validation only.

constraint_blocks.classification: pure helper exists; candidate filtering remains selection-affecting
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderEligibleTeamsConstraint added; filter functions stay in script.js.

constraint_blocks.classification: pure constraint check safe to extract now
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderDuplicatePlayers added; used in helper validator and shared report.

constraint_blocks.classification: depends on DOM/user state, keep in script.js
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderLockedPlayersPresent accepts plain locked IDs, but DOM state collection remains in script.js.

constraint_blocks.classification: depends on DOM/user state, keep in script.js
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderExcludedPlayersAbsent accepts plain excluded IDs, but filtering remains in script.js.

constraint_blocks.classification: pure validation safe; ranking not safe
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderCaptainVice added; captain/vice ranking remains unchanged.

constraint_blocks.classification: pure structure check safe; starter choice is selection-affecting
constraint_blocks.safe_action: validateTeamBuilderStarterBenchStructure added; chooseStartersFromSquad and swap logic stay in script.js.
Rule-check booleans use shared helper while public copy remains unchanged; warning text remains in script.js.

constraints_checked_before_optimization: locked players are filtered by active stage, exclusions, position slots, and team cap
candidate pools are filtered by active stage, exclusions, price, country filter, trust, risk controls, and country cap
display_only_warnings: optimizer did not find a full legal squad
checks_that_mutate_candidate_or_squad: optimizerStateWithPlayer appends players into candidate states
swapStarterWithBench mutates current rendered starter/bench layout
